records.question: Which highschoolers named Logan are in grade 12 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT highschooler.id FROM highschooler
WHERE highschooler.name = 'Logan' AND highschooler.grade >= 12
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Highschooler WHERE name = 'Logan' AND grade >= 12
